actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A cow shed conversion has been refused by the Planning Inspectorate because it has seriously damaged the special historic and architectural interest of a cottage in Ty'n y Ffridd, near Bala.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after being found dead in the river near Broadrock in Chepstow.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A lorry has hit a fire engine on the A50 near Aston-on-Trent, Derbyshire, causing both to ignite and both carriageways to be closed.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The FAW has reported a increase in turnover of £1.6 million for the year ending June 2015, up 18.4% on the previous year.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A forward has scored 12 goals in 10 games for Bristol City in Women's Super League Two last season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Young has been appointed the new manager of Altrincham after the club's relegation from the Women's Super League Two.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Angop state news agency has reported that the flood water has reached 3m (9.8ft) in some areas of the city since Wednesday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The proposal to increase the councillor's allowance was passed by 17 votes to 11 at a meeting on Thursday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Danny Johnson got his 12th goal of the season and Josh Gillies added a second soon after as Gateshead won promotion from Women's Super League Two.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The first warm-up event for wheelchair tennis players has been held.
